name: Solar Array
description: One-time power buffer; ongoing +6 power per level each day.

name: Hydroponics
description: Food stockpile on build; ongoing +6 food per level each day.

name: Habitat
description: Population cap on build; +1 morale per level each day.

name: Workshop
description: Morale on build; +1 morale per level each day from crew culture.

name: Radio Tower
description: Trade contacts on build; +2 credits and +1 morale per level each day.
